use_cases: Comparing before/after images in photo editing or restoration workflows
Showing product variations or versions side-by-side in e-commerce
Comparing property images in real estate listings
Displaying design iterations in creative portfolios
Educational side-by-side visual comparisons in media studies
ai_summary: An interactive image comparison slider component with smooth spring animations for the divider handle. Supports both drag and hover-based interaction modes with full touch support for mobile devices. Uses React context for state management and Motion's physics-based animations for fluid slider movement. Ideal for comparing visual differences between two images with an intuitive draggable divider.
